overview: FoodShare is a food waste reduction platform connecting food donors (hotels, event managers, individuals) with NGOs and delivery agents. Features four role-protected dashboards: Donors post food donations and track status; NGOs browse and accept donations, assign pickup agents; Delivery Agents receive and complete pickups; Admins manage users and view analytics. Built on the Internet Computer with real-time polling, image uploads, and Internet Identity authentication.
features: Donor dashboard: post food donations with photo, track donation status in real time
NGO dashboard: live donation feed with polling, accept/reject requests, assign delivery agents
Delivery Agent dashboard: view assigned pickups, navigate to location, mark pickups complete
Admin dashboard: user management, analytics (food saved, people served, completion counts)
Internet Identity login with role-based access control
Food image uploads via object-storage extension
Role-protected routes for all 4 user types
